assets.title: Shinrin Domain

Towering cedar trees, moss-covered shrine steps, soft komorebi light rays through canopy, gentle mist in valleys, tea terraces in mid-distance. Muted sage and cedar brown palette. Soft watercolor anime background style, nostalgic and healing mood. No people, no text.

assets.title: Grow Your Binder

source.title: Grow Your Binder
source.description: Add depth across wards and seasonal releases. Every new pull opens another line you can run when the ladder shifts.

assets.prompt: Wide cinematic iyashikei anime landscape, Layered binder pages and floating trading cards over a misty cedar forest terrace, gentle morning light, collectible TCG mood landscape feature illustration for a trading card game website tile, soft watercolor, atmospheric depth, gentle vignette, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.

assets.title: Thoughtful Shopping

source.title: Thoughtful Shopping
source.description: Filter the catalog, find the missing piece, and buy exactly what your curve has been waiting for — no rush, no noise.

assets.prompt: Wide cinematic iyashikei anime landscape, Quiet village market stall with displayed trading cards, calm coastal inlet in background, thoughtful shopping atmosphere landscape feature illustration for a trading card game website tile, soft watercolor, atmospheric depth, gentle vignette, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.

assets.title: Open Sealed Bundles

source.title: Open Sealed Bundles
source.description: Crack sealed products and chase a standout pull. Each unopened bundle is a small surprise — chase card or trade bait.

assets.title: Chase Gentle Rarities

source.title: Chase Gentle Rarities
source.description: Hunt foils, epics, and signature prints — the kind of card that rewrites a deck and makes opponents pause to admire it.

assets.title: Pass Along Duplicates

source.title: Pass Along Duplicates
source.description: Extras still have value. List them, fund the next upgrade, and keep your binder lean for the decks you actually play.

assets.prompt: Wide cinematic iyashikei anime landscape, Organized card binder with duplicates laid out beside a small coin pouch, peaceful trading desk by a window landscape feature illustration for a trading card game website tile, soft watercolor, atmospheric depth, gentle vignette, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.

assets.title: Tune Your Deck

source.title: Tune Your Deck
source.description: Prototype lists in the deck lab — test counters, stress synergies, and lock a 30-card answer to the ladder's current pace.

assets.prompt: Wide cinematic iyashikei anime landscape, Deck of trading cards arranged in a curve on tatami beside tea cup, strategy planning mood, soft afternoon light landscape feature illustration for a trading card game website tile, soft watercolor, atmospheric depth, gentle vignette, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.

assets.title: Calm Tactics

source.title: Calm Tactics
source.description: Trade blows on a living board where timing, lane pressure, and burst windows matter more than raw stats. Win the turn before you win the match.
